## cmaf-lite package

## Classes

<table><thead><tr><th>

Class


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

[DashParser](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.dashparser)


</td><td>

A parser that parses MPEG-DASH.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[NetworkResponse](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.networkresponse)


</td><td>

Completed network response with access to the response body as raw bytes or decoded text.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[NetworkService](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.networkservice)


</td><td>

Central service for all network requests. Owns request construction, fetch execution, and cancellation.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[Player](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.player)


</td><td>

CMAF media player. Augments a `<video>` element with adaptive streaming through MSE.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[Registry](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.registry)


</td><td>

Extensible component registry. External code registers components (e.g. a DASH parser) via [Registry.add()](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.registry.add)<!-- -->, the player resolves them at runtime.


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

Description

Type Alias


</th><th>

Description

<tbody><tr><td>

[BufferAppendedEvent](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.bufferappendedevent)


</td><td>

Fired after a segment has been appended to a SourceBuffer.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[BufferAppendErrorEvent](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.bufferappenderrorevent)


</td><td>

Fired when a SourceBuffer append operation failed.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[BufferAppendingEvent](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.bufferappendingevent)


</td><td>

Fired before a segment is appended to a SourceBuffer.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[BufferCodecsEvent](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.buffercodecsevent)


</td><td>

Fired when a SourceBuffer is being created for a new media type.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[ByType](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.bytype)


</td><td>

Narrows a union to the given [MediaType](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.mediatype)<!-- -->.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[InitSegment](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.initsegment)


</td><td>

CMAF initialization segment (moov box).


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[Manifest](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.manifest)


</td><td>

Parsed manifest representing a CMAF presentation.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[ManifestLoadingEvent](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.manifestloadingevent)


</td><td>

Fired when [Player.load()](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.player.load) started loading a manifest.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[ManifestParsedEvent](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.manifestparsedevent)


</td><td>

Fired when a manifest has been fetched and parsed.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[MediaAttachedEvent](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.mediaattachedevent)


</td><td>

Fired when the media element and MediaSource are ready for buffering.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[MediaAttachingEvent](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.mediaattachingevent)


</td><td>

Fired when [Player.attachMedia()](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.player.attachmedia) is called and the media element is being attached.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[NetworkRequest](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.networkrequest)


</td><td>

Mutable request descriptor. Listeners can modify `url`<!-- -->, `method`<!-- -->, and `headers` before the fetch is sent.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[NetworkRequestEvent](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.networkrequestevent)


</td><td>

Fired before a network request is sent. Listeners can mutate the request URL, headers, and method.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[NetworkResponseEvent](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.networkresponseevent)


</td><td>

Fired when a network response has been received.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[NetworkResponsePromise](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.networkresponsepromise)


</td><td>

Promise that resolves to a [NetworkResponse](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.networkresponse) or [ABORTED](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.aborted) if the request was cancelled.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[PlayerConfig](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.playerconfig)


</td><td>

Player configuration.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[RegistoryComponentCtor](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.registorycomponentctor)


</td><td>

Constructor signature for registerable components.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[Segment](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.segment)


</td><td>

Addressable media chunk on the presentation timeline.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[Stream](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.stream)


</td><td>

Set of compatible, switchable tracks sharing a codec and media type. Discriminated by [MediaType](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.mediatype)<!-- -->.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[StreamPreference](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.streampreference)


</td><td>

User preference for stream selection. Properties are optional — only specified fields constrain selection.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[StreamPreferenceChangedEvent](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.streampreferencechangedevent)


</td><td>

Fired when [Player.setStreamPreference()](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.player.setstreampreference) changed the active stream preference.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[SwitchingSet](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.switchingset)


</td><td>

CMAF switching set — tracks that can be seamlessly switched between (same codec, same type).


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[Track](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.track)


</td><td>

Single track with its segment list, discriminated by [MediaType](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.mediatype)<!-- -->.


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
